pull_request.title: Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates: | Package | From | To | | --- | --- | --- | | [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.72.8` | `8.73.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.26.0` | `3.27.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.26.0` | `3.27.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.26.0` | `2.27.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.6.1` | `0.6.2` | | [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.28.1` | `6.29.0` | Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.72.8 to 8.73.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.73.0

What's Changed

  • Python: Add DatetimeUtcNow recipe for Python 3.12 deprecation migration by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6696
  • Register accumulators for nested ScanningRecipes in OR preconditions by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6701
  • Python: Add Python 2 parser support using parso by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6703
  • Correct string block indent by @​BoykoAlex in openrewrite/rewrite#6694
  • Python: Fix some type checking errors by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6705
  • Fix RPC serialization for J.Literal.UnicodeEscape by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6695
  • Python - Python tests plugged into Gradle build by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6706
  • Python: Add pyproject.toml parser with dependency resolution by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6702
  • Add ModuleContainsFile and ModuleUsesType scanning recipes by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6699
  • Preserve implicitly defined version properties in Maven recipes by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6691
  • Python: Add dependency management recipes for pyproject.toml by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6708
  • Python - AutoFormatter by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6707
  • Fix handling of specifying comma-separated value to recipe option of type List by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6700
  • Python - fix the test_remove_decorator test case by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6709
  • Python: Fix ClassCastException in parser by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6710
  • Fix text block indentation by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6712
  • Fix Java 24 runtime compatibility by falling back to Java 21 parser by @​kdvolder in openrewrite/rewrite#6682
  • fix an edge case in RemoveUnusedProperties when there is no parent in filtering by @​nmck257 in openrewrite/rewrite#6687
  • Python: Fix MatchSequence parser incorrectly consuming child's delimiter by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6713

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.8...v8.73.0

Commits
  • 4bab9b4 Python: Fix MatchSequence parser incorrectly consuming child's delimiter (#...
  • 485764e fix an edge case in RemoveUnusedProperties when there is no parent in filte...
  • ae70bc3 Fix Java 24 runtime compatibility by falling back to Java 21 parser (#6682)
  • dbfd350 Fix text block indentation (#6712)
  • 1927f9e Fix ClassCastException: MatchCase cannot be cast to VariableDeclarator (#6710)
  • 96bb3af Fix the test_remove_decorator test case (#6709)
  • 32116b5 Add special handling of List recipe options (#6700)
  • 3f67f62 Python - AutoFormatter (#6707)
  • f24db0c Python: Add dependency management recipes for pyproject.toml (#6708)
  • 1eea4c8 Preserve implicitly defined version properties in Maven recipes (#6691)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks` from 3.26.0 to 3.27.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks's releases.

3.27.0

What's Changed

  • Correcting MockWebServer migration for OkHttp by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#849
  • Add ReturnActual recipe for AssertJ by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#891
  • Add MockConstructionToTryWithResources recipe by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#892
  • Add CleanupKotlinJUnit5AssertionImports recipe by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#893
  • Skip Kotlin files in PowerMockitoMockStaticToMockito by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#894
  • Add test cases for MockedConstruction pattern by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#895
  • Update byte buddy to a Java 25 compatible version by @​Laurens-W in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#897
  • Followup after the formatting merge by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#900
  • Skip TemporaryFolder conversion when used in RuleChain. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#898
  • Add JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 exception class migrations. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#902
  • Make declarative recipes singletons by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#905
  • Handle method references in JUnit Assert to Assertions migration. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#901
  • Add explicit test scope to AssertJ dependency additions by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#903
  • Skip SimplifyChainedAssertJAssertion when actual type has wildcard type parameters by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#906
  • Revert "Add explicit test scope to AssertJ dependency additions (#903)" by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#907
  • Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement to preserve parameterized types when extracting arguments. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#908
  • Enhance RemoveInitMocksIfRunnersSpecified to also remove openMocks by @​dsgrieve in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#904
  • RemoveInitMocksIfRunnersSpecified (or any recipe) should not have a mutable static field by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#910

New Contributors

  • @​motlin made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#898
  • @​dsgrieve made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#904

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks/compare/v3.26.0...v3.27.0

Commits
  • 41e6b42 Extract documentation examples from tests
  • 403dd48 review comment (#910)
  • e6c383b Delete files
  • cf78c5a Enhance RemoveInitMocksIfRunnersSpecified to also remove openMocks (#904)
  • 75c12cd Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement to preserve parameterized types when extracti...
  • 07b43cd Revert "Add explicit test scope to AssertJ dependency additions (#903)" (#907)
  • 3a67bb9 Skip SimplifyChainedAssertJAssertion when actual type has wildcard type param...
  • 02eba0f Add explicit test scope to AssertJ dependency additions (#903)
  • 4e79908 Handle method references in JUnit Assert to Assertions migration. (#901)
  • 35409b0 Make declarative recipes singletons (#905)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java` from 3.26.0 to 3.27.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java's releases.

3.27.0

What's Changed

  • Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency when using javax.annotation by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#972
  • Add com.sun.istack.NotNull migration to Jakarta validation by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#973
  • Add UseListOf and UseSetOf recipes by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#974
  • Lombok Annotation Processor Configuration by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#977
  • Migrate GraalVM resource-config.json from regex to glob patterns by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#976
  • Followup after the formatting merge by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#978
  • Avoid line continuation escapes in text blocks with mixed newline content by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#975
  • Change Docker image version in Java upgrades by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#980

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java/compare/v3.26.0...v3.27.0

Commits
  • 04592ca Expect continuation indent in text blocks
  • f42714b Delete files
  • 9499e38 [Auto] SDKMAN! Java candidates as of 2026-02-09T1052
  • ca26543 Change Docker image version in Java upgrades (#980)
  • 6e525a1 Make declarative recipes singletons
  • dc6029d [Auto] SDKMAN! Java candidates as of 2026-02-02T1038
  • e13f6e8 Update documentation examples
  • 653dd7c Add avoidLineContinuations option to UseTextBlocks (#975)
  • c6b1bcf Followup after the formatting merge (#978)
  • 4f3aaa0 Migrate GraalVM resource-config.json from regex to glob patterns (#976)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis` from 2.26.0 to 2.27.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis's releases.

2.27.0

What's Changed

  • Skip MinimumSwitchCases transformation when type info is missing by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#808
  • Preserve else-if chains in UnwrapElseAfterReturn recipe by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#809
  • Followup after the formatting merge by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#810
  • Make declarative recipes singletons by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#811
  • Fix UnnecessaryThrows to check actual close() method exceptions by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#812
  • Adjust indent in ReplaceRedundantFormatWithPrintfTest by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#815
  • One more test case for ExplicitLambdaArgumentTypes by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#814

New Contributors

  • @​sambsnyd made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#811

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis/compare/v2.26.0...v2.27.0

Commits
  • 21db3b9 Extract documentation examples from tests
  • 82e1520 doesNotImportConflictingClassName (#814)
  • 73b881f Adjust indent (#815)
  • fa551ea Delete files
  • a095673 Fix UnnecessaryThrows to check actual close() method exceptions (#812)
  • a32c4e3 Make declarative recipes singletons (#811)
  • 98e70a3 Followup after the formatting merge (#810)
  • 8c2d7dc Preserve else-if chains in UnwrapElseAfterReturn recipe (#809)
  • 6d3fb00 FixStringFormatExpressions should check for content difference
  • 12d5798 Skip MinimumSwitchCases transformation when type info is missing (#808)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin` from 6.28.1 to 6.29.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin's releases.

6.29.0

What's Changed

  • Skip unresolved property placeholders when determining charset by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1105
  • chore(ci): bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-compiler-plugin from 3.14.1 to 3.15.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1106

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin/compare/v6.28.1...v6.29.0

Commits
  • b4c30ba [maven-release-plugin] prepare release v6.29.0
  • 184e927 Bump rewrite.version property
  • 2c01af1 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • d2ec8a7 Delete files
  • 5abd366 chore(ci): bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-compiler-plugin (#1106)
  • 9792e32 Skip unresolved property placeholders when determining charset (#1105)
  • 27684e2 Bump rewrite.version property
  • a36a35d [maven-release-plugin] prepare for next development iteration
  • See full diff in compare view

                             <artifactId>rewrite-migrate-java</artifactId>
-                            <version>3.26.0</version>
+                            <version>3.27.0</version>

-                            <version>0.6.1</version>
+                            <version>0.6.2</version>
                         </dependency>
                     </dependencies>
                 </plugin>

commit_summaries.message:
Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates

Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates:

| Package | From | To |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.72.8` | `8.73.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.26.0` | `3.27.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.26.0` | `3.27.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.26.0` | `2.27.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.6.1` | `0.6.2` |
| [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.28.1` | `6.29.0` |
